name: Djully Marquez
bio: Artist, educator, and co-founder of COR. Djully combines artistic foundations, color theory, and structured learning with a calm, encouraging environment — helping people build skill, confidence, and creative independence that lasts.

name: Maria Gonzalez
bio: Bastrop-based muralist exploring the intersection of nature and community. Maria's vibrant large-scale works can be found throughout downtown Bastrop, celebrating the town's rich history and natural beauty.

name: James Walker
bio: Documentary photographer capturing the stories of small-town Texas. James focuses on candid moments that reveal the soul of Bastrop's people and landscapes.

name: Sophia Chen
bio: Ceramic artist creating functional and sculptural pieces inspired by the Colorado River and Bastrop's lost pines. Each piece tells a story of resilience and renewal.

name: Derek Brooks
bio: Singer-songwriter and spoken word artist whose work draws from Bastrop's history and the rhythms of rural Texas life. Regular performer at local open mic nights.

name: Nina Ramirez
bio: Fiber artist and weaver blending traditional Mexican textile techniques with contemporary design. Nina leads workshops teaching heritage crafts to the next generation.
